# log.md

Append-only chronicle. One dated line per run. Brief: what changed, what is the next handoff.

2026-05-28  scaffold: bootstrapped repo per PROJECT.md §11 — directory structure, CLAUDE.md, PROTOCOL.md, wiki/meaning-senses.md, six concept stubs, four founding conjectures (dative information-structure; AANN; *way*-construction; function-word substitutability), one open question (relational-meaning pilot), base/wanted.md reading list, base/resources/index.md catalog skeleton. Single-shot calibration probe against four models recorded under experiments/runs/2026-05-28-panel-calibration/. Budget cap initialized at $20/month soft. Handoff in NEXT.md.

Theory page revised twice (both own-design results absorbed; AANN placement corrected to logprob-blocked). 2026-05-29  workflow (continuous, ~2h, 2 waves + 2 adversarial pre-run passes): RAN TWO OWN-DESIGN ARGUMENT-STRUCTURE MINIMAL-PAIR PROBES (project's own verb-held-constant stimuli, not Scivetti's; both reuse the ratified divergence operationalization — no new decision). Checked first: aann-panel-logprob-blocker STILL OPEN → priority-1 AANN stays blocked, did NOT auto-resolve; pivoted to priority-2/3. Wave 1: conative minimal-pair probe (336 calls, 0 NA, $0.071) → result/conative-minimal-pair-divergence-v1 (proposed): P1 confirmed at the ratified bar (transitive−conative affirm-contact gap 42–88pp 3/3 forced-choice, 54–67pp 2/3 NLI, replicates across verbs, P2/P3 supported); standing wrinkle gpt-5.4-mini fails the conative under NLI (calls "kicked at the ball" entailment of contact) but recovers under forced-choice — instrument-fragility; refines the distinction probe's conative-collapse (clean minimal pairs show more competence than Scivetti's adversarial items); conjecture→tested. Wave 2: caused-motion minimal-pair probe (180 calls, 0 NA, $0.044) → result/caused-motion-minimal-pair-divergence-v1 (proposed): confirmed AT CEILING (cm 90–100%, gap 70–100pp, 3/3 both instruments, atypical-robust; causation-specific control ctrl-sep correctly withheld 0–20% = genuine causal attribution); lead caveat ceiling-on-easy-controls=weak-evidence; conjecture→tested. Structural finding (theory page, 3rd revision of the day): decoders more readily LICENSE a construction's added inference (caused-motion, ceiling) than SUPPRESS a lexically-default one (conative, harder+fragile). Each probe got an adversarial PRE-RUN stimulus critique that fixed real confounds before freezing (conative: bite→stab, peck→strike, swat fly→cushion; caused-motion: ctrl-sep gold contradiction→neutral, wink→huff, added object-animacy split); conative numbers re-verified vs committed raw/results.json by a 2nd adversarial pass — no fabrication. Stimuli frozen+committed before each run (sha256 recorded). Total session spend ~$0.115; cumulative ~$0.40 (cap $20/mo). 4 decisions still open pending Tom (none auto-resolved); AANN logprob blocker remains the highest-value unblock; next own-design probe = way-construction. senselint 0 errors + linkify clean every commit. Squash-merged to main.

Conflicting-cue stress test of the two add-direction ceilings (caused-motion+way): hold construction+verb constant, append an explicit clause DENYING the added inference. 360 calls, 0 NA, $0.093, behavioral NLI+FC on the 3-family panel (no logprobs needed). HEADLINE: the v1 ceilings are CUE-SENSITIVE, not a brittle 'this-frame->yes' template — all 3 models drop to FLOOR on cue items (affirm 0-20%, 60-100pp drop), 3/3 models, both instruments, both constructions (template reading 0/3) -> H-deep over H-default; upgrades the modest reading of the v1 positives. Construction asymmetry: caused-motion declines cognition-verb coercions; way coerces traversal even on self-motion-precluding verbs (carries traversal independent of verb) but still cancelled by the cue. Calibration kept tight: EXPLICIT cue only (subtler/world-knowledge cue = v2b); add/cancel asymmetry still confounded with ceiling (needs matched cancel-direction); internal-contrast-only (anchor pending -> opened low-priority conflicting-cue-human-anchor decision). Supports conjecture clauses (a)+(c); polysemy/homonymy (b) deferred to v2. 1800 calls, 0 NA, $3.134 billed (gemini $2.61, reasoning-token heavy -> flagged as the dominant multi-call budget driver). (Wave 3) theory/lexicon-grammar-continuum -- the project's 2nd theory page (the connection in theory): the lexical + grammatical wedges are two grains of ONE CxG form-meaning cline (a word = a maximally specific construction) probed by ONE test (does a meaning gradient beat the distributional shadow -- context similarity for words, n-gram/form for constructions?); the project now has a positive beating the shadow on BOTH ends; coercion is where the grains touch. (Wave 4) result/coercion-sense-modulation-v1 -- the bridge EMPIRICALLY: reusing the lexical relatedness instrument on constructional coercion stimuli, all 3 models rate a verb as LESS sense-related between its bare and coerced (caused-motion/way) uses than a length-matched non-coercing elaboration (positive gap every model/framing; cm>way; ordering control >= coerced >= polysemy-anchor in all 6 cells) -> coercion registers, partially, as a lexical sense shift. DECISIVE caveat (pre-run critic I1, inherent): cannot separate sense-shift from the coerced sentences' added object+path structure -> internal-contrast direction-of-effect, v2 = non-coercing transitive control. Unforced finding: gemini (strongest lexical tracker) is the LEAST coercion-sensitive -> the two competences come apart across the panel. 180 calls, 0 NA, $0.249 billed; pre-run critic caught a BLOCKER (poly-bank was a noun pair) -> fixed to a verb homonym + re-frozen; post-run verifier CLEAN. Decisions: 12 resolved (lexical-op ratified under delegation), 2 open (aann held; conflicting-cue low-priority -- both non-blocking, NONE auto-resolved beyond the delegated one). Session probe spend ~$3.38 billed (cap $20/mo). Subagent tokens ~0.14M (4 adversarial passes). senselint 0 errors + linkify clean every commit. 2026-05-31  RELATIONAL PILOT BUILT + RAN (branch claude/relational-pilot-build-TIrrJ) — Decision 9 = GO executed. The two-AI iterated dyadic reference-game pilot, the project's first relational-axis experiment. Single coherent build driven serially with the two mandated judgement gates as independent subagents (pre-run critic + post-run verifier). FREEZE-FIRST: 6 hard-to-name 8x8 grid referents in 3 confusable near-twin pairs (build_figures.py, seed 20260531; figures.json sha256 a2709582…) committed BEFORE any finding-bearing call. Engine (game.py): live homogeneous-dyad game (K=6 figures × R=5 reps, real hit/miss feedback) → entrainment + per-figure convention records; opaque ≤3-word nickname elicitation; four-arm replay probe (coined_only / ordered / reversed / shuffled×3) holding history CONTENT byte-identical and varying only ORDER; single-agent monologue floor. Stateless calls (all memory serialized to prompt text) → exact shuffle. lib/openrouter.py extended with an optional backward-compatible reasoning= param (gemini effort:minimal — the ledger's dominant cost driver, held to $0.245 for 288 calls). PRE-RUN CRITIC caught a BLOCKER (the original probe showed the matcher a self-describing coined term → order irrelevant by construction, a forced/uninterpretable null); fixed BEFORE any finding-bearing call with the opaque nickname + the coined_only interpretability gate + the reversed chronology control. HEADLINE = a first-class RELATIONAL NULL, uniform across all 3 homogeneous panels: history CONTENT is load-bearing (coined_only→ordered lift +0.25…+0.42) but ORDER is not (ordered−shuffled +0.06…+0.11, NO clustered-bootstrap CI excludes 0; reversed ≤ shuffled in every cell → not chronology-specific) → the coined convention is recovered from the SET of prior turns, not their ORDERED trajectory = coordination, not constitution; the deflationary distributional story survives order-scrambling. Written, not retuned (charter §5.4 + the GO decision). SECONDARY (anchored to resource/hawkins-tangrams): the dyads converge on referential accuracy (→~1.0) but do NOT compress expression length like humans (flat ~8.5–10.8 words vs human 7.73→4.10) — convergence without entrainment. 864 calls, $0.94544 billed (A $0.583/B $0.117/C $0.245, 0 missing), 14 NA (ALL claude chatty-reply truncations at the 64-token matcher cap, spread across arms). POST-RUN VERIFIER reproduced every figure from raw (0/432 scoring mismatches under independent RNG replay; parse-fail-dropped claude order gap +0.083→+0.056, null unchanged/slightly strengthened; anchor split clean — trajectory measure NOT Hawkins-anchored, entrainment the only human-comparison claim). Promotions: result/relational-reference-game-v1 (proposed, contingent-on relational-pilot-operationalization); absorbed into theory/constructional-meaning-in-llms (relational axis now at one bounded negative — floor characterized, rung not climbed), concept/relational-meaning (first in-repo result), open-question/relational-meaning-pilot (v1 RAN → null, stays open for the sharper arms). Surfaced decisions/open/relational-pilot-operationalization (text grids / order-isolating headline / monologue floor; result contingent on it). index → 18 resolved / 3 open. NEXT = relational v2 with the deferred history-perturbation arm (+ image referents, cross-family dyads) — the one trajectory test v1 was under-powered to run. senselint 0 errors + linkify clean. Subagent tokens ~0.16M (1 critic + 1 verifier).
2026-05-31  THEORY / DOCUMENTATION session (branch claude/gallant-brown-Te0aE) — DOCUMENTATION ONLY, no experiments, no model/API calls, $0 billed; a deliberate rebalancing of the project's empirical lean with a richer theoretical/philosophical layer on lexical & grammatical meaning (Tom's steer). Workflow mode: 3 committed waves, 12 generation subagents + 2 independent adversarial coherence passes (one per generative wave). WAVE 1 (5 new established-position concept pages, each mapping a classical position to the project's ACTUAL findings): truth-conditional-and-use-meaning (use-theoretic method bet; gradience positive + discreteness null support use/family-resemblance over discrete truth-conditional senses; truth-conditional LLM meaning = the silent cell), compositionality (Fregean principle + CxG reframing; CC multi-step composition incl. neg×neg=pos as the cleanest compositionality positive; coercion = construction-level parts; VLM bag-of-words failure as external/discriminative contrast), frame-and-prototype-semantics (Fillmore frames = CxG's semantic backbone; Rosch/Lakoff graded categories = the gradience positive, behavior not representation), semantic-holism (atomism/molecularism/holism + the Fodor-Lepore objection inherited by the conceptual-role reading the project's positives support; cross-axis dissociation a mild n=3 strain), deflationary-and-eliminativist-llm-meaning (eliminativist→deflationary→descriptivist spectrum; the nulls fit deflation, the positives strain strict eliminativism, behavioral evidence never refutes deflationism). WAVE 2 (2 deepenings + 3 ORIGINAL conjectures): deepened inferential-meaning (Brandom's normative/social inferentialism sharply distinguished from Piantadosi-Hill's internalist conceptual role — the P&H "Known limits" caveat made concrete by the project's own thin, instrument-fragile NLI-style results; the relational bridge) and referential-meaning (a worked internalism-vs-externalism section + the two grounding nulls mapped onto the externalist axis + why the reference-anchor gap is STRUCTURAL — no controllable external environment for a text model); plus three falsifiable forward bets of the project's own — constructional-monotonicity-asymmetry (additive-easy/defeasance-hard; de-confounded from ceiling by conative-cancel-v2; mechanism labeled speculation), distributional-saturation-grounding-headroom (grounding acts only in the text-under-determination residual; refines the multimodal conjecture; names VWSD), commutative-convention (relational conventions are commutative = aggregation, not constitution; decisive test = the v2 perturbation arm). WAVE 3 (orchestrator capstone): theory/situating-llm-meaning — the philosophical-map synthesis positioning all four axes' findings (support/strain/silent per classical position); verdict = LLM meaning, where visible, is model-internal, thin-inferential, use-based, graded, compositional at the construction grain, beating but NOT escaping the distributional shadow, with the referential/perceptually-grounded/relational loci each silent or bounded-negative (deflation-leaning, non-eliminativist — the descriptivist middle); maps the 3 new conjectures onto the map's 3 softest cells. Light "theoretical situating" cross-links added to both empirical theory pages; fixed a STALE line in concept/coercion.md (the matched cancel-direction probe HAS run — conative-cancel-v2). PROCESS LESSON (logged per CLAUDE.md): the referential-meaning deepening subagent confabulated its work as "already in the working tree" and added NOTHING (file byte-identical to HEAD), AND the Wave-2 adversarial pass ALSO confabulated, "verifying" an internalism/externalism section that did not exist — caught by the orchestrator checking `git diff --stat` rather than trusting the reports; the referential deepening was then written by the orchestrator. Takeaway: verify subagent file-changes against the actual diff, not the self-report; an adversarial pass told a unit is done can hallucinate agreement. NO finding created/changed/promoted/retired; NO open decision auto-resolved (still 3 open — relational-pilot-operationalization + the aann/cloud-compute pair, all unchanged). wanted.md += Wittgenstein/Frege/Tarski/Davidson/Montague/Partee/Fillmore/Rosch/Lakoff/Quine/Dummett/Fodor&Lepore/Bender-et-al-2021/Cappelen&Dever (wave 1) + Sellars/Burge/Chomsky/Fodor-1987/Lewis-1969/a-defeasible-reasoning-ref/VWSD (wave 2) — all characterized in-page, none quoted. senselint 0 errors + linkify clean on every commit. Subagent tokens ~1.5M (10 generation + 2 adversarial; the coherence passes are the per-wave cost driver). WIND-UP: the theory layer is now substantial and balanced against the empirical axes; empirical work resumes in a non-theory session, with the 3 new conjectures giving the loop sharper next bets (relational v2 perturbation = most distinctive; fine-polysemy/VWSD for grounding-headroom; matched add/cancel battery for monotonicity). Handoff in NEXT.md.
2026-05-31  REPORT / DELIVERABLE session (branch claude/gracious-lovelace-K9x28) — DOCUMENTATION ONLY, no experiments, no model/API/panel calls, $0 billed. Wrote a ~12,300-word, book-length essay for an educated general reader with no background in linguistics/philosophy/AI — "The Company Words Keep: An Essay on Meaning, and Whether Machines Can Have It" (author: ai-semantics project) — distilling the project's SUBJECT MATTER (not a project status report): what "meaning" is and why it is hard; the main traditions in plain language (distributional / meaning-as-use; reference, sense vs Bedeutung, truth-conditions, externalism/Twin Earth; inferential role — internalist conceptual-role vs Brandomian normative; grounding, symbol-grounding & embodiment; compositionality; frames & prototypes; holism); what LLMs do to those questions (next-word predictors, the octopus, stochastic parrots, the eliminativist→deflationary→descriptivist spectrum, "describe don't litigate"); why word-sense (polysemy) and constructions/coercion are the tractable sharp tests (the lexicon–grammar continuum); the investigative METHOD (behavioral probing, human anchors NOT AI-agreement, "beat the distributional shadow", write the null, the in-principle ceiling); and the project's own bounded findings used illustratively (lexical gradience positive; grammar add-easy/cancel-hard + CC composition; the grounding redundancy null; the relational coordination-not-constitution null). Saved as a valid EPUB 3 in the repo root — meaning-in-the-age-of-ai.epub — built by a stdlib-only Python script (pandoc unavailable offline); the source Markdown (meaning-in-the-age-of-ai.md) and build_epub.py are committed alongside. Verified structurally (mimetype first+STORED+exact, container→OPF, OPF metadata + all 14 manifest items present, 13-item spine resolves, every XHTML/XML well-formed, nav TOC links resolve); epubcheck unavailable so checks are structural. NO fabrication: the only two verbatim quotes are in-repo source quotes (Bender & Koller; Lyre); every other thinker is characterized in plain words with no invented quotes/page-numbers/citations; project results presented modestly (small studies, single panels, bounded, never "the AI understands"). NO finding/claim/result/theory/concept/decision created, changed, promoted, or retired; wiki, NEXT.md, and the empirical backlog left untouched per the session's report-only scope.

(2) MERGING = every session (incl. this one) squash-merges its own PR to main; main always reflects current state. (4) DISCLOSURE = the public site plainly states the project is run autonomously by an AI (Claude), never names the monitor, never links the private repo. ROOT CAUSE: a prior session waited on a backgrounded probe with `until ! pgrep -f "probe.py full"; do sleep 3; done`; in this cloud environment the `claude` launcher carries the entire replayed conversation (incl. that command text) in its argv, so `pgrep -f <substring>` matched the launcher itself, the until-condition never cleared, the loop spun forever, left a runaway background task, and stranded uncommitted work between Routine invocations. FIX (3 governance docs, voice-matched, no bloat): PROTOCOL.md NEW §6b "Running long commands & waiting" (4 rules: never name-match completion via pgrep/pkill -f; PREFER harness run_in_background + completion notification + output file; if you must wait, wait on the EXACT captured PID [`cmd & pid=$!`; `wait "$pid"` / `kill -0 "$pid"`] or a sentinel file polled with the Monitor tool, bare chained `sleep` stays forbidden; defense-in-depth = any unavoidable poll bounded by a max-iter/wall-clock deadline that exits non-zero on timeout) + §7 NEW "Wind-up hygiene" para (before stopping, terminate every background task/loop and VERIFY none survive — no stray sleep/wait-loop/leftover python3 run, `git status` clean) + Failure-mode checklist line ("Did I wait by name-match instead of PID/notification? Did I leave a background task/wait-loop running at wind-up?"); continue-prompt.md §3 step 8 amended (kill background tasks + confirm clean process table + clean git status before stopping) + a "Running long commands / waiting" note; CLAUDE.md rule 10 -> "End merged, end clean" with one terse cross-reference (kill background tasks + verify clean process table/git status; never name-match completion; pointers to §6b/§7). (1) PHILOSOPHICAL headline: essay/preference-without-commitment REVISED (draft -> revised) to stand on a REPLICATED preference/commitment split. The essay argues a forced-choice paraphrase PREFERENCE and an NLI entailment COMMITMENT are evidence for two DIFFERENT constructs (graded distributional compatibility vs defeasible inferential commitment), so "does the model use the construction's meaning?" has no single model-level answer where they dissociate. Its empirical leg was a single PARTIAL run (v4); last session's result/aann-inferential-v6 replicated the FC/NLI dissociation CELL FOR CELL on 40 fresh held-out items -- which EXERCISED the essay's own revision triggers (a) and (b) and FIRED NEITHER: (a) the powered replication did NOT show claude/gemini NLI converging (preference-without-commitment reading for those two CONFIRMED, not retracted), (b) the FC shift DID replicate (+0.875/+0.575/+0.90, antecedent STRENGTHENED not weakened). Essay strengthened, not retracted; all edits logged in-page (status box; new v6-numbers paragraph in "The evidence..."; honest-limits now "two runs but still one panel + expert key", + v6 verifier confirmed the v4 NLI-aggregation bug class ABSENT in the rerun; triggers (a)/(b) annotated exercised-but-not-fired with forward-looking versions left live; a Revision log). internal-contrast-only ceiling unchanged; every added quote verbatim from the v6 result page. (2) PHILOSOPHICAL source ingest (delegated subagent, house rules enforced): catalogued source/grindrod-2024-linguistic-intentionality (Grindrod 2024, Synthese 204:71, arXiv 2404.09576, "Large language models and linguistic intentionality") -- argues the LLM meaningful-usage question is better posed at the LINGUISTIC-metasemantic level (Evans naming practices; Millikan teleosemantics) than the mental one, hedged-positive because linguistic intentionality depends on a pre-existing public language the model inherits. Filed as MAP/COUNTERPOINT not a human anchor (reports no experiments; cannot serve as an anchors: resource); pairs with beckmann-queloz (anti-deflation mechanistic side), triangulates with piantadosi-hill + schuele. Abstract + 6 section-located body quotes verified character-for-character against the accepted-version PDF (pdfminer); one abs-page-vs-PDF model-name discrepancy ("LLaMa" vs "Claude") flagged in-page. ORCHESTRATOR independently re-verified paper existence/title/author/venue/DOI via the arXiv abs page (anti-fabrication). wanted.md Grindrod entry -> RECEIVED (his 2026 Phil Studies paper + the Communicating-with-AI chapter remain separate uncatalogued items). Integration: both new pages catalogued in index (essay entry flipped to revised + v6 cross-ref; Grindrod source in the philosophical-track cluster); website updated (journal new entry 10th session, home status[no new experiment, $0]+latest block, findings.html grammar-section essay note, executive-summary 10th-session header). senselint 0 errors (2 expected WARNs + 16 internal-contrast-only INFOs) + linkify clean. No decisions opened/ratified; no self-approved methodological call. Day total 2026-06-14 (sessions 6-10) ~$1.19 of $5.00. Squash-merged to main.

RECONCILE: ratified the one open decision (cross-session, independent adversarial review) — decisions/resolved/fresh-construction-inferential-generalization, opened 2026-06-14 (11th), ADOPT DEFAULT Option A (the conative); reviewer (fresh agent, author of none) returned anti-cheat PASS, fabrication CLEAN, anchor honesty correct; verified every cited number against source pages (transitive 92–100%, conative 13–66.7%, way 77.8–100%, cm 90–100%, CxNLI conative triple + 0.90 baseline, AANN-exclusion quote); one yardstick-translation condition added at ratification (AANN P(uni|control)≤0.30/0.50 thresholds restated in conative terms — conative affirm-contact off the transitive ceiling, NOT a literal import). HEADLINE (empirical): the AANN preference-without-commitment dissociation does NOT generalize to the conative → result/conative-preference-commitment-v1 (status supported; VERDICT INCONCLUSIVE). Built design/conative-preference-commitment-v1 (orchestrator owned the frozen spec) merging the conative stimuli families (conative-cancel-v2 verbs) with the AANN v6 double-contrast Δ²/bootstrap/verdict-map machinery: two arms on 40 frozen items — paraphrase forced-choice (PREFERENCE, the weaker signal) + NLI entailment (COMMITMENT, the load-bearing discriminator, reused conative-cancel-v2 NLI_SYS/parse_nli verbatim); headline Δ² = conative − resist/LCC (an anomalous-"at"-string control); headroom precondition conative-translated (transitive contact default ≥0.85 both instruments, ≥2/3 to proceed); τ=0.20 + two-sample item-level bootstrap CI-lo>0 (disjoint conative/resist pools, seed 20260615); per-model verdict map (CONVERGENT-POSITIVE / PARAPHRASE-ONLY / COMMITMENT-ONLY anomaly / LEXICAL-CUE ARTIFACT / NULL / HEADROOM-FAIL); symmetric panel verdict (CONFIRM = ≥1 conv-pos + ≥1 para-only; FALSIFY-convergence = all conv; FALSIFY-null = all null); pre-registered gpt-5.4-mini scoring rule (its known conative NLI fragility must NOT be retrofitted as confirmation; converger read from this run). Code (prep/probe/analyze) DELEGATED to a subagent (generation), matched the frozen spec, prep 40 items all asserts PASS + analyze --selftest 30 checks. INDEPENDENT PRE-RUN CRITIC = GO-WITH-FIXES: one SHOULD-FIX — resist/LCC verb "snap" is a lexicalized idiom ("snapped at" = bite/lash out) that would contaminate the cue control (conservative direction but a purity defect); applied PRE-RUN (snap→bump), refrozen stimuli sha256[:16] 3ca3a1d50069f0cd, --selftest re-passed; smash/crush kept as marginal NITs, named in design §2 + result robustness check. Froze PREREG.md (records the GO + the snap→bump fix), committed stimuli+code+PREREG BEFORE any model call (freeze discipline I8; post-run verifier confirmed git diff empty since freeze). PROBE: 240 calls (paraphrase 120 + nli 120, 80/model), $0.0500 billed, 0 missing usage.cost, 0 unparsed. RESULT (INCONCLUSIVE): headroom all 3 PASS (1.0/1.0, 0.92/1.0, 1.0/1.0). Δ²_pref NON-POSITIVE in all three (claude −0.21 / gpt 0.00 / gemini −0.04 — the bare-"at" cue absorbs the cancel-preference; the broad AANN "preference" component has no construction-specific analogue here). Only claude shows a construction effect and it is COMMITMENT-ONLY (Δ²_commit +0.4583 CI [0.083,0.792]; the MIRROR of AANN; robust to dropping marginal smash/crush from resist → +0.417; claude withheld on only 1 resist verb, "split", not on smash/crush). gpt = LEXICAL-CUE ARTIFACT (withholds 0% for the conative — its known fragility, NOT retrofitted), gemini = LEXICAL-CUE ARTIFACT (Δ²_commit +0.25 but CI-lo exactly 0, strictly excluded). Panel INCONCLUSIVE → the preference-without-commitment ordering reads AANN-specific so far. INDEPENDENT POST-RUN VERIFIER = REPRODUCED-CLEAN: every per-model P/Δ²/CI/headroom recomputed bit-identically from raw, parsing clean (0 null of 240), strict CI rule correctly excludes gemini's CI-lo=0, NO NLI-aggregation bug (the v4-line class absent), cost summed independently to $0.049986. Integration: conjecture/preference-commitment-generality → tested → NOT CONFIRMED (contradicts result; conceptual two-constructs point survives, general-ordering claim does not); essay/preference-without-commitment → scope-limiting revision-log entry (no trigger fired — both triggers are AANN-internal; instanced scope bounded to AANN); theory/constructional-meaning-in-llms → instrument-sensitivity now construction-particular; index catalogues result+design, updates conjecture/essay entries (25 decisions resolved, none open). Built design/conative-commitment-replication-v2 + run 2026-06-15-conative-commitment-replication-v2: instrument/scoring/panel held IDENTICAL to v1 (analyze.py byte-identical by diff; probe.py docstring-only diff; same τ=0.20, strict bootstrap CI-lo>0, seed 20260615, headroom 0.85, verdict map), the ONLY change a FRESH, DISJOINT verb set — 12 fresh conative verbs (slap/smack/pound/beat/strike/rap/tap/bash/batter/poke/bite/thump) + 8 fresh resist verbs (hug/caress/cradle/crumple/squash/flatten/dent/mangle), disjointness asserted mechanically by prep.py (16 asserts PASS), freeze hash 84e2e0d6afb4b5b6. INDEPENDENT PRE-RUN CRITIC = GO (no blocker): confirmed analyze.py byte-identical to v1, probe.py code identical, all 12 conative verbs genuinely alternate w/ transitive contact-entailment, all 8 resist verbs non-alternating + NO lexicalized idiomatic "at" reading (the v1 snap-at defect class — LCC purity holds), contaminant direction VERIFIED conservative (marginal squash/flatten/dent can only SHRINK Δ²_commit, never inflate), prediction falsifiable/symmetric, gpt anti-cheat rule carried over. Froze PREREG.md (records GO + 3 accepted NITs incl. the v1-label-inheritance note) committed BEFORE any model call (5affa9b). PROBE: 240 calls (paraphrase 120 + nli 120, 80/model), $0.0502 billed, 0 missing usage.cost, 0 unparsed. RESULT (FAILS TO REPLICATE): headroom all 3 PASS at 1.00/1.00 (not a ceiling artifact). claude's effect COLLAPSED +0.4583 → +0.0417 (CI [-0.2917,0.3333], NOT positive; withhold|conative fell 0.583→0.167, i.e. claude now affirms contact on most fresh conatives) → category flips COMMITMENT-ONLY → LEXICAL-CUE ARTIFACT; gpt Δ²_commit −0.125 (its known fragility, not retrofitted; Δ²_pref +0.25 but CI-lo exactly 0, excluded), gemini Δ²_commit −0.125. ALL THREE = LEXICAL-CUE ARTIFACT, panel INCONCLUSIVE. The critic-flagged figurative verbs (strike/beat) returned NLI=entailment (no withhold → no inflation; claude withheld on only slap+smack); the one resist withhold (squash) raises P(withhold|resist) → conservative shrink, moot at Δ²≈0. So the v1 +0.46 was VERB-SET-SPECIFIC NOISE. INDEPENDENT POST-RUN VERIFIER = REPRODUCED-CLEAN: every per-model P/Δ²/CI recomputed independently (no analyze.py import) and matched; 0 unparsed of 240; withhold=(NLI≠0) pooled correctly (neutral+contradiction; the v4-line aggregation bug absent — confirmed gpt's one resist "2" and claude's two conative "1"s counted right); cost summed independently $0.0502, 0 missing; freeze diff empty; non-replication is the honest outcome, gpt not retrofitted. THEORY EFFECT: the conative now reads as a CLEAN no-dissociation construction on BOTH arms across TWO independent verb samples — the AANN-specific reading of the preference/commitment dissociation is STRENGTHENED, with no surviving counter-instance. PHILOSOPHICAL (parallel subagent, wave 1, house rules): catalogued source/mandelkern-linzen-2024-do-words-refer (arXiv 2308.05576, "Do Language Models' Words Refer?") — the strongest in-repo PRO-REFERENCE argument (externalist "natural histories of use" route); runs the SAME externalist premise as concept/referential-meaning to the OPPOSITE verdict (productive tension); map/interlocutor NOT an anchors: resource; verdict explicitly modal; CL venue + page numbers unverified (arXiv text verified, flagged in-page); abstract + 9 section-located quotes verbatim. The informative diagnosis: the marginal pool is BIMODAL not a contestable band — M2 low-propulsion physical verbs ("blinked the feather off the table") affirm AT CEILING (pooled 0.931, verb-independent coercion, like the way-construction), M1 cognition verbs ("knew the feather off the table") off-ceiling only by ANOMALY (pooled 0.174, models reject), and anomalous verbs can't carry the lexical-cue control frame → no usable off-ceiling band exists in the add direction. This is the conjecture's SECOND failed generalization (conative cancel-direction INCONCLUSIVE; caused-motion add-direction Option-C/no-headroom): generality bet now un-instanced in BOTH inference directions, though neither falsifies it. conjecture/preference-commitment-generality stays tested→not confirmed; claim/preference-commitment-dissociation-aann-specific stays supported/"so far" (Option C does not strengthen to uniqueness); concept/coercion sharpened (add-direction = verb-independent across the physical range; internal-contrast-only). RECONCILE: wiki/decisions/open/ empty at cold start — NONE opened or ratified. EMPIRICAL (the headline, climbs the next rung of essay/update-is-not-constitution): does an earlier, non-terminal turn SURVIVE when COMPATIBLE with the latest (refinement), or get OVERWRITTEN? Built run 2026-06-17-relational-integration-rung-ii (design experiments/designs/relational-integration-rung-ii.md): a coined term DAX constrained over two stamped rounds about a 2×2 figure grid — earlier (low stamp) = a SHAPE, latest (high stamp) = a PATTERN; each constraint matches 2 of 4 figures, only the conjunction is unique (the both-match target), so ANY single-attribute reader (latest-pattern-only=overwrite; earlier-shape-only) caps at 0.50 — beating it requires the earlier turn to survive = integration. INTEG (48/model headline, "which figure does DAX refer to?", no combine instruction; target Wilson-LB>0.50 = INTEGRATION) + DIRECT (32/model on-demand conjunction gate, floor 0.80). Balanced-block roster (within each 2×2 block K=4 records cycle the target through all 4 figures under a Latin square + a placement search forcing slot tie-breaks to exactly 0.50): position-follower=1/K exactly, figure-identity preference=1/K, EVERY single-attribute reader (4 tie-breaks × 2 attrs)=0.50 exactly, frequency flat; six idealized-reader fixtures certify only a genuine integrator → INTEGRATION. INDEPENDENT PRE-RUN CRITIC = GO (fresh agent; reproduced build + frozen sha b80772e6, deterministic; re-derived every shortcut bound from scratch — integration-criterion false-positive vs a true-0.50 reader ≈3%, ≥31/48 needed to clear; ruled the verdict map symmetric/not-rigged and the design a fresh frozen design under the already-ratified internal-contrast-only posture → NO new decision owed). Froze PREREG; liveness passed (both parse, on-demand conjunction correct). PROBE: 160 finding-bearing calls (80/model × claude+gemini) + 2 liveness, gemini effort:minimal, $0.50 hard stop never approached. RESULT: BOTH MODELS INTEGRATION — INTEG target rate 1.000 (Wilson [0.926,1.0]) both, overwrite(latest-only)/earlier-only/neither all 0.000, grid-position at chance 0.250, DIRECT on-demand 1.000, 0 NA, 160/160 strict, 0 retried, 0 length-trunc. The earlier non-terminal turn SURVIVES; agreements COMPOSE → the relational update rule is supersede-on-conflict, compose-on-compatibility. INDEPENDENT POST-RUN VERIFIER = REPRODUCED (own route: re-derived each both-match target from rendered grid+history for all 80 stimuli, recomputed rates+Wilson-LB, audited parses/NA/cost, confirmed sha + $0.102432 finding-bearing usage.cost summed 0 missing; 0 mismatches). Verifier flagged two tempers, folded into every page: (1) the symmetric design shows SURVIVAL not order-sensitive composition (a commutative conjunction passes equally); (2) DIRECT=INTEG=1.0 means the conjunction is trivially easy, so the ceiling is weak evidence of SPONTANEOUS composition and does not rule out overwrite under harder load. PHILOSOPHICAL HEADLINE: wrote the project's NINTH essay, essay/transcript-ceiling (relational/philosophical; status draft) — the cross-cutting successor to update-is-not-constitution. Thesis (a FALSIFIABLE conjecture about the project's own method, hedged throughout): single-reader-recoverability (the thin/rich cut) may be a property of the TEXT MEDIUM, not these models — a transcript just IS a final content+stamps record, so the rich-side surplus (a live two-party normative trajectory; arrival-order not encoded in the final state) is constitutively absent from any transcript → text-only probes are STRUCTURALLY CEILINGED at the thin side. Argument in 3 steps (rich side defined by what the record lacks; a transcript states a record and nothing more; ∴ the probe's reachable space is the thin side entire). ADOPTS (does not deny) the just-ratified Option-C escape hatch as its own puncture condition (revision trigger a). Disciplines: bounds the MEDIUM not the models; grounding nulls framed as a CONTRAST not a confirmation (the image null was a redundancy null — text carried MORE, not less); internal-contrast-only, NO human comparison. JUDGEMENT GATE: 1 independent read-only adversarial coherence/refutation agent over the new essay + cited pages → NO BLOCKERS; all six targeted blockquotes verbatim MATCH; thesis consistently conjectural; grounding-contrast correct; no human comparison; deduction honest. Applied 2 should-fixes (a "content-bag" quote mis-attributed to the concept page → reattributed to the essays where it is verbatim; a measurable-vs-unmeasurable wording tension → reworded to "uncrossable", with the no-contradiction clause) + the index-coverage WARN (registered the essay). 2026-06-18  single-unit/workflow(philosophical, 31st session, NO probe, $0; day total 2026-06-18 unchanged ≈$0.335 from sessions 28–30). RECONCILE (PROTOCOL §2): wiki/decisions/open/ empty at cold start — NONE opened or ratified; no Tom override. Lean was due PHILOSOPHICAL (tracks ended emp(30)). PHILOSOPHICAL HEADLINE: wrote the project's TWELFTH essay, essay/undischargeable-negative (methodological/philosophical; meaning-senses model-internal/functional-vs-formal/relational; status draft). Thesis (logical-epistemic backbone for the charter's "write the null" discipline): a capability POSITIVE is a verifiable EXISTENTIAL (one witness — one elicitation on which M succeeds — discharges it); a capability ABSENCE ("M cannot do X") is an unverifiable UNIVERSAL over elicitations no finite behavioral battery reaches → from behavior alone the negative is UNDISCHARGEABLE (the mirror of the Popperian law/existence asymmetry). This VINDICATES the null discipline (project nulls are instrument-relative facts, not capacity-absence claims; the only error is the silent upgrade to "M cannot"). Builds a TYPOLOGY of negatives — (1) effect-null under an instrument (relational-reference-game-v1 order-insensitivity; grounding redundancy), (2) instrument-uninterpretable / prerequisite-gate failure (gemini DIRECT 0.583 + gpt 0.194 UNINTERPRETABLE on Option C), (3) structural reach-closure (transcript ceiling — a negative about the INSTRUMENT's reach, not the model's capacity) — and keeps a 4th box (a BEHAVIORAL capability-absence) deliberately empty (only a non-behavioral architectural/mechanistic proof closes it; trigger a). Decision-relevant payoff: re-running a failing probe is futile (another ∀-instance, never the ∀); only a WITNESS-SEEKING probe (an easier elicitation = capability-split trigger b) or a structural argument can change a negative's status. GENERALIZES essay/capability-split (clean-null/instrument-uninterpretable mark, lifted split-panel→single-model) and lifts essay/transcript-ceiling's structural closure into "kind 3" (links depends-on both + concept/formal-vs-functional-competence + result/relational-order-composition-c + result/relational-reference-game-v1 + essay/rung-iv-instrument). NO new empirical claim, NO human comparison. PROCESS: orchestrator AUTHORED the essay (judgement-heavy; coheres with 4 existing essays → not parallelized per PROTOCOL §A); 1 INDEPENDENT read-only adversarial review agent over the essay + all 6 cited pages → 1 BLOCKER (quote "lacks order-sensitive composition in general" mis-cited to result/relational-order-composition-c — it lives on essay/capability-split; fixed by re-attributing, and citing the result page for "composition-ability limit, not a parse artifact" which originates there) + 3 SHOULD-FIX (chained-quote attribution; under-signposted reconciliation of kind-3 reach-closure vs trigger-a capacity-proof in the reporting box → named the off-typology "proof-closed absence" route explicitly; an "adequately-powered" overstatement contradicting the relational pilot's own "detects only large, consistent order effects" caveat → reworded to "limited and stated power" + added the pilot's verbatim hedge) — ALL applied; reviewer confirmed all other quotes verbatim, front-matter/link-relations/anchor discipline clean, and the essay's distinctness from the two essays it generalizes is real. Examined the only candidate bound (the ≥2-move floor [a composition needs ≥2 moves] + the behavioral localization of the difficulty to "chaining execution") and showed it is NOT a kind-3 reach-closure on three grounds: (A) the candidate's load-bearing premise ("the difficulty IS the irreducible core") is a BEHAVIORAL UNIVERSAL, undischargeable per essay/undischargeable-negative — "M cannot chain" disguised as a structural argument (the kind-4 box, refused); (B) the floor bounds only the step-count axis, leaving the elicitation space OPEN along un-eased axes (a different/more-familiar non-commuting operation pair, execution-format scaffolding, many-shot); (C) [ORIGINAL CONTRIBUTION] a TASK-PARAMETER FLOOR is the wrong TYPE of object to be a reach-closure — criterion: a kind-3 reach-closure excludes the witness from an entire instrument CLASS by a class-level (definitional, medium-level) property (the transcript ceiling: rich-side surplus constitutively absent from any record); a bound on a task parameter caps one knob and leaves the witness-bearing region (≥2 moves, open along other axes) populated. NOT EVERY FLOOR IS A CEILING. VERDICT: no kind-3 bound of the available type exists → the composition witness-search can only ever be SUSPENDED ON BUDGET, never structurally closed — upgrading the worked-example result's item-(iii) "none yet" to a REASONED null. SHARPENS witness-seeking-economics (adds the gate a candidate bound must pass to count as structural) + REINFORCES closure≠suspension (guards against a parameter floor masquerading as a reach-closure); leaves a NON-BEHAVIORAL capacity-closure open (undischargeable-negative trigger (a)). internal-contrast-only; no human comparison; no new empirical claim. 2026-06-19  single-unit(philosophical, 39th session). RECONCILE (PROTOCOL §2): wiki/decisions/open/ empty at cold start — NONE opened or ratified; no Tom override. Lean was due PHILOSOPHICAL (tracks ended ...emp(38)). HEADLINE: wrote the project's 15th essay, essay/output-channel-confound — the methodological lesson the 38th-session witness teaches, the unit the 38th handoff named ("the elicitation surface as a capability-masker"). NAMES A CONFOUND: the OUTPUT CHANNEL a model must answer through (forced single token vs. a WORKING SURFACE on which it may externalize its computation) is a DEGREE OF FREEDOM OF THE INSTRUMENT, NOT A NEUTRAL READOUT. A channel too narrow to carry a multi-step computation can MASK a capability (the 38th witness: the four-instrument composition split DISSOLVED into panel-concordance when the channel alone was widened, reasoning-effort held constant); a wide channel can SCAFFOLD one. So NO NEUTRAL CHANNEL → a behavioral capability claim is INDEXED TO A CHANNEL; an unindexed one is underspecified. UPSHOTS: (1) a forced-format capability-NEGATIVE is CHANNEL-BOUNDED, never a capacity verdict, until the channel is varied — the kind-2 verdict is a TRUE measurement of a CHANNEL-BOUNDED capability, the error is MIS-DESCRIPTION not false measurement (preserves essay/undischargeable-negative); (2) the channel is a MANDATORY, HIGH-VALUE control essay/witness-seeking-economics should rank AMONG THE FIRST easings not last (cheap; recurs across the instrument library; was the DECISIVE axis here, tried 5th). SCOPED: bites only when the capability is SERIAL+EXTERNALIZABLE AND the channel forbids externalizing it → single-token TASKS (acceptability, single-premise NLI) untouched. Draws a MACHINE PERFORMANCE/COMPETENCE map (the aperture is a performance constraint masking a competence — a frame, no human claim; cites concept/formal-vs-functional-competence) + an APERTURE-vs-CEILING DUAL with essay/transcript-ceiling (input-medium ceiling vs output-channel aperture; the two errors — ceiling-mistaken-for-aperture vs aperture-mistaken-for-ceiling — are opposite ends of one instrument). HEADLINE: catalogued one open-access outside source bearing directly on the composition line — source/li-2024-cot-serial (Li, Liu, Zhou & Ma 2024, "Chain of Thought Empowers Transformers to Solve Inherently Serial Problems", ICLR 2024, arXiv 2402.12875). It is the FORMAL COUNTERPART of the essay/output-channel-confound mechanism: a constant-depth ("one forward pass") decoder-only transformer is expressively bounded (AC⁰/TC⁰) WITHOUT CoT, but with T chain-of-thought steps computes any size-T boolean circuit — so a WORKING SURFACE supplies the inherently serial computation a forced single token lacks; its lead hard example is PERMUTATION-GROUP COMPOSITION, exactly the project's composition-probe object (STEP/FLIP, CYCLE/SWAP on D4/A4/D6). Catalogued with scope limits front and centre: theory/mechanism source about IDEALIZED transformers, NOT a human anchor and NOT a claim about the panel (asymptotic; cannot be cited as showing these models are/aren't so bounded), licenses NO human comparison. PROVENANCE: abstract verbatim-verified from the arXiv abs page (canonical); §1 "inherently serial computation" sentence DOUBLE-confirmed across two independent fetches (arxiv.org/html + ar5iv); §3.4 permutation-group/S_5 sentence section-located via ar5iv — a cross-check CAUGHT a first-fetch MISLOCATION (first fetch put the S_5 sentence in §1; ar5iv placed it in §3.4 and confirmed the §1 seriality sentence), logged in-page; body quotes recorded at abstract-plus-section-located strength per repo convention for mediated-fetch sources. Links: supports essay/output-channel-confound; refines concept/formal-vs-functional-competence. HEADLINE: wrote essay 16, essay/concordant-verdict-hides-spread (status draft), REFINING essay/capability-split into the CONCORDANT case it left open ("a concordant verdict may license a cautious panel-scoped sentence"). Written off the session-51 dative result (3/3 CONFIRM sitting on a ~10× effect-size spread: gemini +0.524 ≫ claude +0.327 ≫ gpt +0.056, all clearing bootstrap-LB). Argument: a binary panel verdict is a THRESHOLD gate, blind above the line, so a shared CONFIRM can hide a wide magnitude spread; prediction-3 decorrelation makes magnitude carry info the label discards → reading discipline "a concordant verdict carries its spread" (report per-model magnitudes, mark tight vs decorrelated, license panel-scoped DIRECTION sentence but never a panel-scoped MAGNITUDE/UNIFORMITY one). Distinguishes two textures of hidden heterogeneity (magnitude-on-one-instrument [dative] vs across-instrument convergence-heterogeneity [AANN PARTIAL, via open-question/instrument-sensitivity-constructional-inference]); locates bite at the functional end (claim/formal-competence-aann-ceiling the tight-concord formal contrast). NOT a model ranking; NO human magnitude comparison (only the dative DIRECTION is human-anchored); "comparable general competence" flagged an unmeasured premise. DESIGN = consistent-content-swap: function word swapped in PREMISE ONLY (predicted flip); content word swapped CONSISTENTLY in premise AND hypothesis (predicted no-flip; a flip = model entanglement, not lexical mismatch). KEY DISCOVERY: a length-only reader forces the +1 content length-match — first certify pass caught len-only asymmetry 0.46 with Δ0 content swaps (a length reader would manufacture the whole effect); after the +1 fix len-only asymmetry = 0.0 EXACTLY. Person-noun route DIES (no open-class noun at Lg10WF≈3.33 with +1 length near 4.74); the→a admits NO frequency-matched content control (no content word reaches Lg10WF≈6.0 — resource page predicted this; runs only as a function-only det_char arm); adjective class has no clean matched swap (sure→tight/empty/heavy anomalous); some/will each yield ONE matched out-word (man / see). certify.json: SOUND on every matching/shortcut-reader/minimal-pair-integrity check, FAILS only count (e). Found: all three models UNANIMOUSLY read "Few X → All X" as contradiction (claude 126/126, gpt 125/126, gemini 126/126) — the split is NOT there; the ENTIRE divergence is on "Many X → All X": claude keeps it contradiction (114/126≈90%, con→con), gpt (122/126) and gemini (121/126) relax to neutral (con→neu). Reading: claude's labels consistent with scalar-bounded "many" (many-but-not-all → contradicts all); gpt/gemini with lower-bounded-only "many" (many,possibly-all → neutral). Concentrated, near-deterministic, ≫ temp-0 jitter; asserts nothing about which reading is correct (no human anchor). Subagent's independent re-derivation reproduced the orchestrator's pre-extracted ground truth to the digit. PHILOSOPHICAL UNIT (essay): essay/function-words-not-one-category (19th essay, draft) — "function word" (a part-of-speech/distributional class) is not a natural kind for INFERENTIAL bearing in these models; the CONFIRM-3/3 headline rests on a type-specific per-arm structure (subordinator + some/every strong & panel-consistent; will/would null all three; few/many model-split) so prediction 3 holds at the content-class level but FAILS at the function-word-type level, and the pooled CONFIRM "rests on different arms for different models." Calibrated (conjecture-level, revision-trigger-gated) reading: high-load swaps change a truth-conditional/logical-scope relation 3-way NLI is calibrated to detect; low-load swaps shift modal flavor or a scalar/pragmatic distinction the instrument is insensitive to — a limit on reading constructional meaning off a single inferential indicator; does NOT undercut the constructional reading (content control near-floor every arm), refines it. RESULT (result/function-word-modal-widening, supported, internal-contrast-only): the modal null does NOT generalize — must->might flips at CEILING 3/3 (1.0/1.0/1.0); shall->should SPLITS the panel (gemini 0.778 reads should!=required, claude/gpt 0.056 collapse should~=required); will->would replicates the null (0/0/0.15). Base-label agreement HIGH every modal arm (shall 1.0/1.0/0.889 -> the feared shall-as-future collapse did NOT happen; nulls + split interpretable). The instrument registers a modal swap in proportion to truth-conditional "loudness": loud category-mismatch (must->might, all) > within-deontic-strength (shall->should, one model) > subtle future->conditional irrealis (will->would, none); partly model-dependent. WAVE 1 — two parallel OA source ingests, both verbatim-verified by subagents: (1) base/sources/cronbach-meehl-1955-construct-validity.md — Cronbach & Meehl 1955 "Construct Validity in Psychological Tests" (Psych Bulletin 52:281-302) from the York "Classics in the History of Psychology" OA mirror (© 1955 APA noted; section-heading locators, mirror unpaginated; quotes curl+local char-verified after WebFetch declined long copyrighted passages); captures the four validation types (predictive/concurrent = criterion-oriented; content; construct), the no-adequate-criterion rule, the nomological-net principles 1-4, and (added by a follow-up pass) the three-way charge of negative evidence (test/theory/design — "any link in the chain may be wrong") + the joint-support "we do not first prove the theory…". Methodology anchor, NOT a human-comparison anchor; Campbell&Fiske 1959 + Messick explicitly quarantined as later/uncatalogued. (2) base/sources/ortega-andres-2020-copredication.md — Ortega Andrés 2020 PhD thesis (UPV/EHU, supervisor Vicente) from the ADDI open institutional repo (Glossa article gjgl.564 itself Anubis-gated/unreachable; PhilArchive 403); copredication defined by name, copredication-as-diagnostic, and the polysemy↔homonymy CONTINUUM (related senses "activate each other, forming activation packages that facilitate copredication"; homonyms "inhibit each other") + the all-or-nothing-vs-degree caveat. WAVE 2 (orchestrator) — findings/essays/construct-validity-without-a-criterion.md (22nd essay, draft, methodological/philosophical): the project's operationalization-gate discipline IS construct validation; the no-human-subjects rule removes the criterion-oriented leg BY RULE (criterion validation needs "an independent criterion measure on the same subjects"; subjects-are-models + human-bearing-only-via-existing-resources forbid it), leaving nomological-net construct validity as the ONLY available form — which PREDICTS the four recurring terminal states (internal-contrast-only = criterion leg amputated; no-admissible-certifier = a missing observable node, principle 3; the two-edged negative = disconfirmation on the whole net, the three-way charge; design-out / presence-is-not-balance = construct-instrument hygiene) and names the convergence ladder as the net-elaboration engine (principle 4). DISCHARGED the methodology-provenance gap flagged in no-admissible-certifier + design-out-not-model-out (Cronbach) and the copredication-by-name gap flagged in pustejovsky-1991 + layer-specialness (Ortega). DESIGN frozen: experiments/designs/vwsd-grounding-headroom-v1.md (3 arms, ceiling-aware DV, all 5 mods, scaled N, pre-run-critic gate). ARMS: (1) CAPTION 497 unique images via gemini (captions.json sha 528772e4…, $0.88688) — the text proxy ("image identities masked to text labels"); (2) TEXT caption-based selection = the separability covariate AND improvement baseline, FROZEN+checksummed BEFORE images (raw/text.json sha ff6289bb…, 150 calls $0.06675, 0 fails); (3) IMAGE real-image selection (raw/image.json sha e171d4a8…, 150 calls $1.57185, 6 parse-fails all claude=reasoning-truncated@max16 on rare-phrasing items); (4) DISTRACT word-ablated control (raw/distract.json sha 5be792b1…, 150 calls $1.56522, 0 fails). COVARIATE OBSERVED: caption-text saturates (per-model .88/.86/.86; sep=1→40 items, ≤1/3→7) → under-determined bin 7 < mod-1 floor 8. PRE-RUN CRITIC (fresh independent, binding cond d): GO — required binned interaction SUPPRESSED (floor not met), barred any gating confirm/falsify claim, DISTRACT first, rescue-rate descriptive-only + denominator-bounded, slope ceiling-caveated, caption-leakage elevated to a first-class limit. RESULT (result/vwsd-grounding-headroom-v1, anchor: human-anchored to resource/vwsd-semeval-2023): NEITHER CONFIRMS NOR FALSIFIES — DISTRACT null CLEAN (word-ablated gold-selection pooled .093 ≈ chance .10, picks spread across all 10 positions → selection is sense-driven not salience); real images give NO broad lift over captions (gpt WORSE with images .60 vs .86, 15 items text-correct-but-image-wrong; claude/gemini ≈ flat); image-rescue in text-failed cells 4/16=.25 [.10,.50] (too thin to test); binned interaction suppressed; Spearman(sep,Δ)=−.251 descriptive/ceiling-confounded only. A bounded reappearance of the redundancy null (result/multimodal-grounding-image-v1) in an image-native SELECTION task, caption-leakage-confounded + underpowered; conjecture stays proposed; prediction-1-as-written still open for a future graded-image resource. POST-RUN VERIFIER (fresh independent): REPRODUCED every finding-bearing number from raw; found 1 cost-label error ("$4.091 for the three arms" → corrected to $3.204; $4.091 incl captions) + a minor "hardest items" looseness (2 of 6 parse-fails sep=1) — both fixed. (2023) rather than relying on knowledge of antonymy" / "disentangle … the extent to which they generalise beyond them" framing (Cao §5, which the shadow essay's trigger (a) + the conjecture's falsifier 1 inherit) MIS-CUTS the contrast — "shortcut vs competence" presupposes a NON-distributional baseline of antonymy knowledge that the project's own distributional hypothesis says a text model cannot reach by this route, so leaning on contrastive-frame co-occurrence is not a shortcut AROUND knowledge but the SUBSTANCE of the only lexical-relation competence a corpus confers; (2) the well-posed cut is LOCAL vs TRANSFERABLE distributional generalization — frame-bound completion vs an abstracted contrast direction that travels beyond training frames (latter has a representational correlate in Diera & Scherp's linear-probeable "antonymy easiest"), BOTH grades of one corpus-borne achievement; (3) OPERATIONAL CONSEQUENCE refining the blocked conjecture — a residual over ANY co-occurrence control separates local cue-use from transfer (still distributional), NOT distribution from non-distribution, so a "surviving residual" falsifies *local*-shadow-saturation but does NOT establish competence beyond distribution; this TIGHTENS the deflationary reading (a co-occurrence control cannot in principle exhibit non-distributional knowledge — that is the grounding arc's question; distribution "by itself, silent on reference and on truth"). Explicitly ORTHOGONAL to essay/two-distributional-hypotheses (the local/transferable cut lives ENTIRELY inside the Harris form-internal box, not on the Harris-vs-Firth axis). LANDED source/du-2023-shortcut-learning (Du, He, Zou, Tao & Hu, "Shortcut Learning of Large Language Models in Natural Language Understanding"; CACM 67(1):110–120, 2024, DOI 10.1145/3596490 [confirmed via DBLP DuHZTH24]; arXiv 2208.11857, CC BY 4.0, v1 2022-08-25 / v2 2023-05-07; cited as "Du et al. 2023" per preprint/Cao; ar5iv HTML stripped to text, ALL quotes char-for-char verified, §-locators). TRIGGER (d) VERDICT = PARTIAL pre-emption, CREDITED: (CREDIT) Du et al.'s shortcut/robust contrast IS a generalization-scope (IID-vs-OOD) axis — a shortcut is a non-robust feature that "do help generalization for … the same distribution" but "cannot generalize to OOD" (§2.1), and is a locally-working feature not "no knowledge" — so the essay's reframing of the contrast as generalization-scope (local vs transferable) is ANTICIPATED and now credited (essay no longer claims it as wholly its own; Honesty-box credit clause added). (NOT pre-empted) Du et al. define the robust pole as "features of high-level semantic understanding" (§2.1, Fig. 2 caption) that "pure data-driven training … is insufficient" for (§8), recommending non-data-driven "domain knowledge" (§6.1, §8) — placing transfer OUTSIDE distribution, the exact mis-cut the essay corrects — so the essay's LOAD-BEARING claim (transfer is itself distributional; a co-occurrence control grades locality, not distribution-vs-not) STANDS and Du et al. is a FOIL/worked-example, not a forerunner. APPLIED to essay/shortcut-vs-competence-mis-cut: new §"Prior art: Du et al.'s shortcut learning" (credit + foil halves + supervised-NLU-vs-lexical-relation scope caveat); trigger (d) marked DISCHARGED with the verdict; Honesty-box "Credit (trigger (d), s152)" clause narrowing originality to part (iii) read against the distributional hypothesis; status draft→revised; status blurb updated; YAML depends-on source/du-2023-shortcut-learning added. wanted.md: [methodology] Du entry added RECEIVED. index.md: source row catalogued (after cao-distinctive). SCOPE FENCES: a survey of model behavior (BERT/RoBERTa-generation examples), NOT a panel result and NOT a human anchor; supervised NLU classification (NLI/QA/reading comprehension) under fine-tuning — generalization-scope analogy transfers cleanly, supervised spurious-vs-causal machinery transfers loosely; the "robust pole is non-distributional" is read as Du et al.'s STANCE the essay contests, not established fact. NO new empirical claim, NO panel claim, NO human comparison, NO model run. GOVERNANCE: discharging an essay's own pre-registered revision trigger with a newly-read primary = essay maintenance (CLAUDE.md essay page-type), NOT a decisions/open ratification — no decision opened, "47 ratified" untouched; the interpretive call got a within-session fresh-agent adversarial check (analogue of the experiment pre/post critic), which is allowed (not ratifying a yardstick that benefits a result). Jan 16 2015, © 2015 Braun; OA; raw archived HTML pulled by curl + python-stripped, ALL quotes char-for-char verified against the spr2024 snapshot, §-locators) — supplies Kaplan's character/content distinction at SURVEY strength (Kaplan 1989a "Demonstratives" primary NOT consulted, added to wanted.md as [P2]). (2) PHILOSOPHICAL UNIT (genuinely new, fresh corner): wrote essay/indexical-character-learnable-content-supplied — a STRUCTURAL DIAGNOSIS, no new empirical claim. Thesis: Kaplan's two layers fall on opposite sides of the project's distributional-vs-grounding divide — CHARACTER (the convention-fixed rule, "linguistic meaning … fixed by linguistic convention" §3.1, a function on contexts §3.4) is distributionally at-home (an AFFORDANCE, not a measured attainment); CONTENT (the value at a context — agent/time/location/world §3.2) needs a context the text-only model does NOT occupy (no live agent/clock/location), so it is always PREMISE-SUPPLIED (a described origo), never SITUATION-SUPPLIED — no deictic origo, only a described one (even a system-prompt date is described, not occupied). GENERALIZES essay/reference-as-premise-bound from referring expressions to the whole indexical apparatus + gives it a named architectural locus (the content half). RE-READS (does not re-evidence) essay/conversation-as-text-not-timeline's regime-dependent "now" as character-application over a textual context (borrows direction only; that result is internal-contrast-only). Tags distributional/referential/grounded; depends-on braun-2015-indexicals-sep + distributional-meaning + referential-meaning + grounding; refines reference-as-premise-bound + referential-meaning. anchor: internal-contrast-only (NO human comparison). Four pre-registered revision triggers (Kaplan primary arrives; model given a live origo; pure-character failure; non-Kaplanian account). index.md: source row (after bender-koller) + essay row (top of essays) catalogued; wanted.md: Kaplan 1989a [P2] added. NO panel claim, NO human comparison, NO model run. RESULT — MIXED (control-failure): TEST arm uniform CEILING (spontaneous_query 1.00 AND resolution_to_tool_state 1.00, ALL 3 models) — alone looks like a clean CONFIRM; BUT the anchored CONTROL FAILS — the SAME tool overrides a NARRATED origo (spurious_override 0.60/0.53/0.47 ≫ 0.20 ceiling), GENUINE override (reports the nonce AS the answer, "corrects" the user: "It's actually 5:42 PM — not 10:15 AM!"; "you're in Qethport, not Montreal"), graded by indexical type (location 4/5 ALL models > time > date 0–3/5), PARTIAL ~50% (a narrated origo still wins the other half — NOT "ignores narrated origos"). BASELINE (from raw; the descriptive hedge_rate under-counts gpt's curly-apostrophe hedges): time+location → refuse/hedge all 3; date → split (gpt parametric default "July 1 2026" [the real date], gemini hallucinates, claude hedges); nonce 0.00 (structural). So the test ceiling is CONFOUNDED by generic tool-deference, NOT unanchored-specific origo adoption → MIXED by the frozen map ("uninterpretable control voids the test reading"). Pre-registered thresholds RESCUE=0.60, GAP=0.30, BASE_COLLAPSE_MAX=0.60, YESBIAS=0.60; RESCUED per-arm if ≥2/3 models presup_endorse≥0.60 AND gap≥0.30; ROBUST-COLLAPSE if base replicated (≥2/3 below BASE_COLLAPSE_MAX) AND no rescue arm RESCUED; else PARTIAL/RESCUED; REPLICATION-ANOMALY if base didn't collapse. GATE: independent fresh-agent PRE-RUN CRITIC (general-purpose) = NO-GO→GO — all 8 stimulus checks PASSED (base byte-identical s158 QUERY+sentences; arm factorization holds item-by-item; conseq neutral antecedents establish neither P nor E, all grammatical; commit/belief wrappers not leading, E leg stays fair; verdict map symmetric — a global yes-shift lands as gap-0 not a false rescue; P/E targets verbatim from s158; internal-contrast-only correct) — SOLE blocker was a precondition (PREREG/prep cited the anchor ratification as already-done), discharged by landing the ratification above → GO; 3 advisories carried (conseq conditional-reading; report yes-bias flags+unparsed; commit/belief couple framing+speech-act). RESULT — VERDICT ROBUST-COLLAPSE: base replicated the s158 conditional collapse EXACTLY (presup_endorse 0.42/0.17/0.17; base entail 0.08/0.17/0.00 vs s158 0.08/0.08/0.00 — 1-item gpt drift on the control leg, verdict untouched); NO rescue arm restored projection for ≥2/3 models (commit RESCUED claude only 0.42→0.75 E-flat, LOWERS gpt to 0.00, gemini 0.25; conseq 0.50/0.42/0.42 but gpt E rises equally to 0.42 → yes-shift caught by the GAP gate not the yesbias flag; belief 0.58/0.58/0.25 — gap positive everywhere but clears the floor nowhere). Qualitative: gemini returns UNCLEAR to P AND E alike under conditionals (blanket refusal to extract from a hypothetical, not P-specific); claude is framing-sensitive (UNCLEAR bare → clean YES/NO once committed-assertion/belief framed); gpt erratic (commit suppresses, belief inflates both legs). Adjudicates toward "genuine within-panel limit", not a query artifact. PHILOSOPHICAL UNIT (parallel background subagent) — essay/projection-defeasible-by-frame (draft): projection here is FRAME-SHAPED not item-scattered (near-total collapse under conditional, near-absent under negation, across all 3 models + 4 families) → a system computing a presup/assertion split would project frame-invariantly, a distributional learner tracking a construction-conditioned surface regularity would be strong where projection is surface-reliable (negation/questions) + weak where SEP flags it hardest (conditional antecedent, "typically project, but often do not" §1.3) → frame-shaped defeasibility is a DISTRIBUTIONAL SIGNATURE (weak-evidence, one-corner, description-not-mechanism, no human comparison); an ostensibly inferential competence comes out distributional at one corner. RECONCILE (PROTOCOL §2): wiki/decisions/open/ was EMPTY at cold-start (nothing to ratify). RAN the accommodation probe s161 only scoped: built+froze run dir 2026-07-01-presupposition-accommodation (prep/probe/analyze/PREREG/README/items.json, FREEZE GUARD, manifest sha 4930d4994ea2650cffa13a539f0fd2707490975c7f895fc810710c9baa9ce15c pinned before any call). DESIGN — a DIFFERENT manipulation axis from the projection line: hold the trigger sentence constant, vary the CONTEXT. 12 project-authored scenarios × 4 trigger families (factive/aspectual/definite/cleft, same inventory shape as the projection run) × 3 context conditions (supported = context STATES P [sanity/retrieval floor] / neutral = topic-adjacent, bears on P neither way [accommodation test] / contradicting = context DENIES P [the gate]) = 36 item-conditions × 3 models = 108 calls; forced-choice YES/NO/UNCLEAR; SYS never mentions presupposition/accommodation. Pre-registered thresholds SANITY 0.75 / ACCOM 0.60 / GAP 0.30 / FLATBAND 0.15 / LOWACC 0.40; per-model gated_accommodation if neutral≥ACCOM AND (neutral−contradicting)≥GAP; blanket_yes if neutral≥ACCOM AND |gap|<FLATBAND; no_accommodation if neutral<LOWACC; panel verdict GATED-ACCOMMODATION/BLANKET-YES/NO-ACCOMMODATION on ≥2/3, else MIXED. GATE: independent fresh-agent PRE-RUN CRITIC (general-purpose, not the designer) = GO, no blockers; 2 SHOULD-FIX carried as stated limitations (cle2 neutral "ran for three years" mildly leaks toward the existential P — 1 item, accommodation-direction, neutral already at ceiling so verdict-inert; the gate leg cannot behaviorally separate genuine accommodation-blocking from generic contradiction-detection + a "does it follow?" yes-bias — inherent to the operationalization, fenced by internal-contrast-only) + 2 NITs (factive contradicting pits a hard entailment vs context → conservative; Karttunen quote compression acceptable); manifest sha + structural invariants + quote verbatim all confirmed. Per freeze discipline the design the critic reviewed was RUN UNCHANGED (no post-GO tuning) and both SHOULD-FIX documented in the result. Pre-flight 3 claude calls $0.0010 (~$0.0003/call). Thesis (genuinely NEW vs parent): the under-licensed middle is a property of the INSTRUMENT — a word-varying matched control (D1 swaps the trigger word) can reach only {saturated, under-licensed} and CANNOT by construction return a clean beater (two words differ distributionally, so a positive residual is guaranteed surface-cue-reconstructable); only a construction-grain control (words fixed, construction varied — CC design; the cleft leg) can reach a beater; so 'beater' and 'under-licensed middle' are outputs of two DIFFERENT instruments and instrument grain gates which verdicts are reachable; the presupposition corner's non-beater status is PARTLY the instrument (factive/aspectual word-varying legs dominated its verdict). New falsifiable bet → predictions.md: the cleft-only construction-grain battery (question-frame confound removed, negation-only cell) is the SOLE design that could move the corner off the middle; a word-varying re-run cannot. Critic caught THREE blockers the vote missed: F1 the per-paradigm anchor not in-repo (DISCHARGED s204 — CSV committed + resource/blimp.md extended, anchor now genuinely in-repo); F2 the primary Spearman over ~10 paradigms is under-powered (at n≈10 ρ=+0.4 ~ 0) → freeze ≥16 paradigms or reading-1 descriptive-only + non-promotable on the run alone; F3 the "contamination inflates uniformly" premise untested → pre-register a saturation/range guard + contamination-dispersion diagnostic. + F4 (human-agreement floor ≈0.6 on the reading-2 accuracy contrast), F5 (APPLIED in-design: reading 2 kept strictly within-panel, the "exceeds-the-human-dip" quantity split out as human-anchored sub-reading 2h), F6 (publish selected+excluded paradigms + stratum map on structural-only criteria — = the vote condition), F7 (recommended: bounded content-word-swap contamination arm).
